core_claim_bundle: LIMEN contributes an uncertainty-aware public-source observatory architecture built around source-family saturation, evidence tiers, duplicate control, legal caution, and residual-category visibility.
main_limitations_to_state_explicitly: Must say the atlas is not complete, aggregate counts remain provisional where staged exports lag normalization, multilingual authority is uneven, and thin families still cap stronger substantive claims.
dashboard_or_figure_dependency: Source-family saturation map; taxonomy heatmap; legal uncertainty matrix; duplicate-review graph; provisional evidence-tier funnel; authoritative document-depth facet; public-sector disclosure asymmetry panel
next_gate: Refresh shared normalized exports so the figure bundle can move from architecture-first to count-stable packaging without changing the bounded route.

core_claim_bundle: LIMEN can support a bounded empirical article about what public AI edge cases reveal about security, governance, and legal uncertainty across categories and disclosure surfaces, while already carrying one bounded Danish governance sidecar plus two bounded FTC authoritative-core subtype rows outside the default Table 1C ladder: DoNotPay as non-finance official AI-claim support and Workado as detector-governance / false-capability support.
main_limitations_to_state_explicitly: Must avoid prevalence, stable country ranking, recurrence, procurement-transparency, compliance, or balanced-security-ecosystem rhetoric until joins are stable and thin families are hardened, and must keep Denmark governance-only with translation caution plus DoNotPay and Workado outside the default Table 1C denominator unless deliberately revised.
dashboard_or_figure_dependency: Jurisdiction/language visibility map; evidence-tier funnel; public-sector disclosure asymmetry panel; AI-washing posture ladder with bounded official FTC subtype rows outside the default ladder; security/agentic crosswalk excerpt
next_gate: Need stable global case IDs, refreshed aggregate-safe exports, `sf08` court-depth improvement, `sf09` buyer-side public-sector traceability, and `sf11` independent-security-depth hardening before this route becomes the lead package; any move beyond denominator-neutral sidecar use should be deliberate and synchronized.

core_claim_bundle: LIMEN can show how attested evidence-processing envelopes wrap difficult public AI edge-case artifacts through live lifecycle coverage, case-linked receipts, and one reviewer-checkable local shared bundle without claiming allegation truth, legality, certification, or external trust witness.
main_limitations_to_state_explicitly: Must say the profile proves process discipline only, detached signatures/transparency receipts/issued VCs are still absent, and the shared publication object is still local-only rather than externally witnessed.
dashboard_or_figure_dependency: Authoritative document-depth facet; security/agentic governance crosswalk excerpt; downstream dashboard artifact audit; attestation timeline
next_gate: Add one stronger witness bound to the shared bundle manifest — for example a detached-signature verification note or real transparency/publication receipt — before pitching this as more than a narrow companion methods paper.
